PublishingInfo.Description: Accuracy-first face processing using SCRFD detection and AdaFace recognition.
PublishingInfo.Author: Chris Maunder, Matthew Dennis

RouteMaps.Name: Face Detection
RouteMaps.Description: Detects faces in an image and returns the coordinates of the faces.

Inputs.Name: image
Inputs.Description: The HTTP File Object (image) to be analyzed.

Inputs.Name: min_confidence
Inputs.Description: The minimum confidence level for an object will be detected. In the range 0.0 to 1.0.

Outputs.Name: success
Outputs.Description: True if successful.

Outputs.Name: message
Outputs.Description: A summary of the inference operation.

Outputs.Name: error
Outputs.Description: (Optional) An description of the error if success was false.

Outputs.Name: predictions
Outputs.Description: An array of objects with the x_max, x_min, max, y_min, label and confidence.

Outputs.Name: inferenceMs
Outputs.Description: The time (ms) to perform the AI inference.

Outputs.Name: processMs
Outputs.Description: The time (ms) to process the image (includes inference and image manipulation operations).

RouteMaps.Name: Face Comparison
RouteMaps.Description: Compares two faces in two images and returns a value indicating how similar the faces are.

Inputs.Name: image1
Inputs.Description: First HTTP File Object (image) to be analyzed.

Inputs.Name: image2
Inputs.Description: Second HTTP File Object (image) to be analyzed.

Outputs.Name: success
Outputs.Description: True if successful.

Outputs.Name: similarity
Outputs.Description: How similar the two images are, in the range of 0.0 to 1.0.

Outputs.Name: inferenceMs
Outputs.Description: The time (ms) to perform the AI inference.

Outputs.Name: processMs
Outputs.Description: The time (ms) to process the image (includes inference and image manipulation operations).

RouteMaps.Name: List Registered Faces
RouteMaps.Description: Lists the users that have images registered in the Face Recognition database.

Outputs.Name: success
Outputs.Description: True if successful.

Outputs.Name: faces
Outputs.Description: An array of the userid strings for users with registered images.

RouteMaps.Name: Register Face
RouteMaps.Description: Registers one or more images for a user for recognition. This trains the face recognition model and allows the face recognition to report back a userId based on an image you supply that may or may not contain that user's face.

Inputs.Name: imageN
Inputs.Description: The one or more HTTP File Objects (images) to be registered.

Inputs.Name: userid
Inputs.Description: The identifying string for the user.

Outputs.Name: success
Outputs.Description: True if successful.

Outputs.Name: Message
Outputs.Description: face added

Outputs.Name: inferenceMs
Outputs.Description: The time (ms) to perform the AI inference.

Outputs.Name: processMs
Outputs.Description: The time (ms) to process the image (includes inference and image manipulation operations).

RouteMaps.Name: Delete Registered Face
RouteMaps.Description: Removes a userid and images from the Face Registration database.

Inputs.Name: userid
Inputs.Description: The identifying string for the user.

Outputs.Name: success
Outputs.Description: True if successful.

RouteMaps.Name: Face Recognition
RouteMaps.Description: Recognizes all faces in an image and returns the userId and coordinates of each face in the image. If a new (unregistered) face is detected then no userid for that face will be returned.

Inputs.Name: image
Inputs.Description: The HTTP file object (image) to be analyzed.

Inputs.Name: min_confidence
Inputs.Description: The minimum confidence level for an object will be detected. In the range 0.0 to 1.0.

Outputs.Name: success
Outputs.Description: True if successful.

Outputs.Name: predictions
Outputs.Description: An array of objects with the userid, x_max, x_min, max, y_min, label and confidence.

Outputs.Name: inferenceMs
Outputs.Description: The time (ms) to perform the AI inference.

Outputs.Name: processMs
Outputs.Description: The time (ms) to process the image (includes inference and image manipulation operations).
